visual_description: A woman with shoulder-length brown hair, wearing a white hospital gown and covered by a pink blanket, sits upright in a hospital bed, facing slightly to her right. A man with dark hair, partially visible on the right side of the frame, sits beside her, looking toward her. Medical equipment, including an IV stand and monitor, is visible in the background behind the bed.
audio_description: The audio features a female voice with a high pitch and moderate speed, expressing strong negative emotions through words like 'evil bitch' and 'sick bastard'.
